title: cercestis afzelii
intro: Cercestis afzelii, also known as African ironwood or afzelia, is a tropical tree species native to West Africa, valued for its valuable timber and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bark, leaves, and seeds of Cercestis afzelii have been used in herbal preparations to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing. In some African cultures, the plant is also used to make medicinal teas, infusions, and ointments to treat various health issues, highlighting its potential as a natural remedy.
